description.ko: 유리 매질을 통해 빛이 굴절되고 고유의 색상으로 분산되는 물리적 현상을 예술적으로 시각화하여 명확함과 변화를 상징적으로 표현했습니다.
description.en: An artistic visualization of the physical phenomenon of refraction, where light bends and disperses into its component colors through a glass medium, symbolizing clarity and transformation.

prompt: A macro shot of a triangular crystal prism resting on a minimalist matte black surface, a focused beam of pure white light entering through one side and refracting into a vivid, sharp rainbow spectrum on the other, caustic light patterns, hyper-realistic texture, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, soft bokeh background.
